name: Glazed Fruit Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups cold milk or half and half
1 package (4 servings) lemon, peach, orange, or red jello
1 1/2 cups fresh or drained canned fruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour milk into a large bowl.
2. Add pudding mix.
3. Beat with a wire whisk for 1 minute.
4. Pour the mixture into the crust.
5. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
6. In a separate large bowl, stir boiling water into gelatin until completely dissolved.
7. Stir in cold water. Refrigerate for 1 hour or until thickened (a spoon drawn through leaves a definite impression).
8. Pour 1 cup of gelatin over the pudding layer.
9. Arrange fruit on top of the gelatin.
10. Spoon remaining gelatin over the fruit.
11. Refrigerate for 2 hours or until firm. Makes 8 servings.
